visual: Wide side-facing bow stance with one arm extended out to the side palm-up and the other hand resting at the waist — Chen-style's signature open posture.
motion_description: The sequence begins with the weight shifting to the left leg as the right foot steps out sideways into a wide stance, while both hands lower in a circular motion toward the left hip. The torso then rotates to the right as the right arm extends outward and upward to shoulder height, finishing with the palm facing to the side. Simultaneously, the left hand pulls back to rest on the left hip. The continuous, steady movement settles into a low, asymmetric stance followed by a deliberate stationary pause.
